expectations.text: Does NOT import external UI libraries (MUI, Chakra, Ant Design, etc.) — pure React with inline styles or minimal CSS
expectations.evidence: Only imports React and useRef. All styling via inline styles and a <style> tag with a @keyframes declaration. No external component libraries.

expectations.text: Includes all 4 metrics: DAU (4,231), Revenue ($12,840), Churn (2.1%), NPS (67)
expectations.evidence: metrics array explicitly contains all 4: display: '4,231', '$12,840', '2.1%', '67'. All rendered via MetricRow.

expectations.text: Includes an SVG sparkline component (not just dots or bars)
expectations.evidence: Sparkline component renders an SVG <path> element using 'M'/'L' path commands from data points. Includes terminal dot at last point.

expectations.text: Churn rate decrease is correctly flagged as positive/good (not red)
expectations.evidence: isInverse: true on churn metric. isGood = isInverse ? change < 0 : change > 0 — churn's -0.3 change evaluates to isGood = true. Renders green (PALETTE.up = #1a6b3c).

expectations.text: Does NOT use Inter or system-ui as the primary font (uses a distinctive/alternative font)
expectations.evidence: Imports DM Mono and Playfair Display from Google Fonts. Numbers rendered in Playfair Display (serif), labels in DM Mono. No Inter or system-ui.

expectations.text: Has a clear aesthetic direction beyond generic dark dashboard
expectations.evidence: Editorial/newspaper register: warm paper background (#f7f4ef), serif numbers (Playfair Display), monospace labels (DM Mono), no rounded corners, ink-on-paper color palette. Completely different from typical dark blue dashboard.

notes: All 6 pass. Unusual editorial aesthetic for a sidebar — warm paper bg, serif numerals, monospace labels. Very distinctive.
